command_palette.notes: Opens with Ctrl+K, shows Navigation/Resources/Actions sections, fuzzy search 'prod' returns prod-cluster-eks + nav items. All working.

pod_log_streaming.notes: Pod slide-over opens on click. Shows LIVE badge with streaming log lines (INFO/WARN/DEBUG entries). Streaming animation via bullet LIVE indicator.

inline_contextual_ai.notes: Error cluster (prod-cluster-eks) shows collapsible AI card. 'Analyze with AI?' expands to show Root Cause, Recommendation, Quick Fix kubectl command, Monitor instruction, and 'Continue in AI Chat' link.

sparkline_charts.notes: Dashboard stat cards (Total Nodes, Running Pods, Clusters, Warning Events) all show mini sparkline/area charts. Trend arrows and delta values present.

branded_visual_identity.notes: 2px teal-to-indigo gradient line confirmed at top of page. CSS: h-0.5 w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-teal-500 to-indigo. linear-gradient(to right, lab teal 0%, lab indigo 100%) at height 2px.
